label: CIS Safeguard 12.6
title: Use of Secure Network Management and Communication Protocols

prose.en: Adopt secure network management protocols (e.g., 802.1X) and secure communication protocols (e.g., Wi-Fi Protected Access 2 (WPA2) Enterprise or more secure alternatives).
Secure network management and communication protocols are adopted.

example.en: Examples include 802.1X, Wi-Fi Protected Access 2 (WPA2) Enterprise or more secure alternatives.
